display.purpose: Hero headlines only; blunt, high-confidence claims.

headline.purpose: Section titles and major proof points.

body.purpose: Developer-facing explanation with generous dark-mode line-height.

code.purpose: Commands, CLI names, status output, and terminal examples.

shadows.name: primary-cta-ring
shadows.purpose: Default outline-shadow for the primary docs/install pill.

shadows.name: primary-cta-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover-only glow for the primary CTA, never cards.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.value: transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease
motion.purpose: Default interaction timing for links, cards, and CTAs.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Future animations should provide reduced-motion alternatives.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Main action pill for docs, install, or one high-priority route.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: #34d399; color: #0a0a0b; padding: 12px 24px; text-align: center; font: 600 14px/1.43 var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(52,211,153,0.4); transition: background-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2ee4a8; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(52,211,153,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #34d399; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost GitHub Link
components.description: Quiet secondary pill for external links and lower-priority actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #d4d4d8; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.43 var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #fafafa; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #34d399; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-star { color: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Terminal Panel
components.description: Signature proof surface for blocked and allowed command examples.
components.html:
$ git reset --hard HEAD

✖ BLOCKED by CC Safety Net

Reason: destroys all uncommitted changes. Use 'git stash' first.

$ git checkout -b feature/auth

✔ allowed
components.css: .ds-terminal { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: #0e0e10; color: #71717a; } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding: 0 16px; } .ds-dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-red { background: #f87171; } .ds-amber { background: #fbbf24; } .ds-green { background: #34d399; } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 20px; font: 400 14px/1.625 var(--font-geist-mono), ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-terminal-body p { margin: 0; } .ds-terminal-body p + p { margin-top: 8px; } .ds-muted { color: #71717a; } .ds-blocked { color: #f87171; } .ds-allowed { color: #34d399; } .ds-rule { margin: 16px 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }

components.name: Integration Card
components.description: Compact compatibility card for supported coding CLIs.
components.css: .ds-integration-card { display: flex; min-height: 88px; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: #111113; padding: 16px; color: #fafafa; transition: border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-integration-card:hover { border-color: rgba(52,211,153,0.5); } .ds-integration-card h3 { margin: 8px 0 0; font: 600 16px/1.5 var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-integration-mark { display: flex; width: 48px; height: 48px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #a1a1aa; font: 600 12px/1 var(--font-geist-mono), ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; }

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: A compact top strip that keeps brand and GitHub/docs access visible.
components.html: CC Safety NetGitHub
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; height: 64px; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: rgba(10,10,11,0.8); padding: 0 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: #fafafa; font: 600 14px/1.43 var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-logo { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: #34d399; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(10,10,11,0.35); } .ds-nav-link { border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #d4d4d8; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.43 var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #fafafa; }

narrative.overview:
The visual system should feel like a hard stop inserted into a developer's real command line: dark, plainspoken, and impossible to miss when danger appears. It is not a generic AI product wrapper. It is a tight landing page that earns trust by showing exact commands, exact outcomes, and the supported tools a developer already uses.

The page is fixed dark because the product lives near terminals, code editors, and command output. That choice is not permission for neon decoration. The surface stays nearly black, the panels stay flat, and the status colors do the work: green for allowed or protected, red for blocked or destructive, amber only for familiar terminal-window affordances.
keyCharacteristics: Blunt developer-native copy, anchored in real command examples.
Flat dark panels with subtle borders instead of decorative depth.
One primary status accent, used sparingly and functionally.
Rounded corners are restrained: 12px for panels and cards, full pills only for actions.
CLI integrations and terminal output are first-class visual objects, not supporting decoration.

rules.name: The Status-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and amber must describe product state or action priority. If a color does not answer "allowed, blocked, warning, or primary action," remove it.

rules.name: The No Cream Rule
rules.body: Light cream, beige, sand, and paper backgrounds are forbidden. This brand does not borrow warmth from startup stationery.

rules.name: The Mono Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Use Geist Mono for commands and tool output, not as a decorative shorthand for "developer." If the text is not command-like, keep it sans.

rules.name: The No Shouting Rule
rules.body: Display headings stop at 4.5rem today and must never exceed 6rem. The danger comes from the command example, not oversized typography.

rules.name: The Flat Panel Rule
rules.body: Cards and terminal panels use borders, not drop shadows. If a panel needs more separation, adjust tone or border strength before adding elevation.

dos: Do show exact commands and outcomes before explaining the abstraction.
Do use Guard Green for primary action, allowed/protected status, and focus treatment.
Do use Block Red only for blocked or destructive command states.
Do keep panels flat, bordered, and dark with 12px maximum card radius.
Do pair every status color with text or symbols so color is not the only cue.
Do keep command examples readable on mobile and prevent terminal panels from horizontally overflowing.
Do foreground supported CLIs, docs, GitHub, and installation paths.
donts: Don't use light cream or beige startup themes.
Don't abstract away from the real shell commands being blocked.
Don't make the page look like an observability app, a security-enterprise brochure, or a generic developer-tool landing page with interchangeable feature cards.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative side-stripe borders, repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows, or numbered section markers as scaffolding.
Don't pair a 1px border with a broad soft card shadow. Choose the border.
